_comment: EXAMPLE fireside speaker schedule. The engine ships this generic template; the real per-instance schedule is private DATA at <data-root>/config/fireside-schedule.json (resolved via get_data_config_dir()). Copy this there and fill in your own cycle start date, themes, and speaker names. cycle_1_start_monday is an ISO date (a Monday). Each week lists Monday + Wednesday speakers.

weeks.theme: Best book I've read this year
A place I've lived (or want to live)
